docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT WOODS REMODELING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ON SEP-23-2010 - OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF, DAVID J. COOK, ESQ., PURSUANT TO LETTER OF SEPTEMBER 14, 2010. NO APPEARANCE. NOT REPORTED.
